notes.en: DAPI stock: dissolve 5 mg in 1 mL ddH₂O, aliquot and store at −20°C protected from light. Working solution (1 µg/mL) should be prepared fresh. For fixed/permeabilized cells: incubate 5–10 min at RT in the dark, wash 2× with PBS. Ex/Em: 358/461 nm (blue fluorescence). Membrane-impermeant in live cells — used for dead cell exclusion in flow cytometry (0.1–0.5 µg/mL). Mounting media with DAPI is more convenient for microscopy.
notes.zh: DAPI stock: 5 mg 溶于 1 mL ddH₂O，分装后 -20°C 避光保存。工作液 (1 µg/mL) 现配现用。固定透化后的细胞: 室温避光孵育 5–10 min，PBS 洗 2 次。Ex/Em: 358/461 nm (蓝色荧光)。活细胞不透膜，用于死细胞排除 (流式 0.1–0.5 µg/mL)。封片用含 DAPI 的封片剂更方便。
